IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (24402267.pdf)
SUMMARY: Human resources coordination and management professional with a strong background in employee training and development, new hire orientations, and employee relations. Committed HR Professional with around 3.5 years of experience.
SKILLS: HRIS, ISO, Recruitment, Performance Appraisal, Training & Development, Leave & Attendance, Entry & Exit

SOURCE: 24402267.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Mar 2008 - Jun 2010
DESCRIPTION: ['Sourced and shortlisted resumes from job portals and internal data banks.', 'Coordinated interviews and onboarding processes for new hires.', 'Assisted in the design of performance appraisal forms and conducted PMS workshops.', 'Managed HRIS, employee master records, and payroll.', 'Conducted training needs analysis and organized training programs.']
